response.justification: James Smith brings 15+ years of broad engineering experience across distributed systems, full-stack web, embedded, and AI tooling, but the resume shows no meaningful overlap with the core requirements of this role. There is no evidence of building or operating experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature-flagging systems, telemetry pipelines, or growth measurement frameworks. The current seniority (Staff/Senior) falls below the Principal/IC6 target level, and the career arc is that of a polyglot generalist rather than a growth-engineering specialist with cross-team systemic impact at scale.
strengths: 15+ years of engineering breadth spanning distributed systems, full-stack, embedded C/C++, and recent AI-agent/MCP infrastructure
Demonstrated high-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency constraints
Recent work at re:cinq on AI-agent frameworks and developer tooling signals adaptability to emerging engineering paradigms
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience — no A/B testing, feature flagging, rollout automation, bias detection, or statistical analysis of experiments mentioned anywhere
Seniority gap: currently Staff/Senior level with no evidence of Principal-level cross-team architectural ownership, multi-workstream technical leadership, or org-wide platform influence
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or growth engineering background; Python is absent from skills; data aptitude is limited to geo-data and operational tooling rather than product analytics

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or growth platform experience
